◎简　　介  

　　A large format 3D experience from the makers of PULSE, THE LAST REEF and GREAT WHITE SHARK 3D.The movie explores South Africa's coastline, and the apex predators that patrol its waters: sharks, dolphins, whales and man... their prey: the supershoal of billions of sardines that lurk in the deep cold waters of the Indian Ocean.  This is where Africa meets the sea...Filmed over ...
